original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Penelope, Emily, Aiden, and Jack. Penelope said, "Penelope is a knight or Jack is a knave." "Aiden is a knight" - Emily. Aiden remarked, "If Emily is a knight then Penelope is a knave". Jack stated, "Emily is a knight or Jack is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
